web_design_live_server: Normalize diagnostics export redaction_status to enabled/unreported/failed.
Expose claim_scope=support_artifact_only in sanitized result data.
Keep bundle_path basename-only and changed_files as diagnostics_bundle markers.
web_design_ui: Show redaction_unreported amber and redaction_failed red.
Use support artifact copy and avoid runtime health success claims.
Keep ledger and compact action state aligned with export-result state.
tests: Updated UI tests to reject invented redaction proof.
Added UI tests for enabled and failed redaction states without runtime green.

state_mapping.condition: status=ok and redaction_status=enabled and artifact reference exists
status=ok and redaction status is missing or not recognized
state_mapping.allowed_claim: Artifact created but redaction proof is not reported.

state_mapping.condition: status=ok and redaction status reports failure
status=ok but no artifact reference is available

state_mapping.allowed_claim: Export timed out and may be retried.

state_mapping.condition: result status command_error or unrecognized failure status
state_mapping.allowed_claim: Command did not create successful support artifact.

checks.command: python3 -m json.tool audit_results/ui_web_diagnostics_export_result_review_and_polish_pass_2026-05-15/surface_scan_2026-05-15.json && python3 -m json.tool audit_results/ui_web_diagnostics_export_result_review_and_polish_pass_2026-05-15/verification_matrix_2026-05-15.json && python3 -m json.tool audit_results/ui_web_diagnostics_export_result_review_and_polish_pass_2026-05-15/independent_audit_2026-05-15.json
